overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, starting from a covered pedestrian walkway with vending machines, passing through a neon-lit open plaza with geometric canopy structures, and ending along a multi-lane street with towering holographic billboards and light traffic. The footage is from a video game featuring heavy rain, wet reflective surfaces, and dense neon signage.

row of illuminated vending machines with various products and red signage

segments.scene_description: Walking through a covered pedestrian walkway sheltered from heavy rain, passing yellow structural beams and illuminated vending machines on the left. The area is semi-enclosed with neon lighting, transitioning toward an open plaza visible ahead.

wet pavement reflecting the vibrant neon lights from surrounding structures

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway into an open plaza exposed to heavy rain, surrounded by striking geometric canopy structures with shifting neon colors. The wet pavement reflects the vibrant purple, blue, and cyan lights while a large holographic billboard displays colorful imagery on the right.

segments.scene_description: Approaching the street level while gazing up at massive vertical billboards and towering glass skyscrapers. The camera tilts upward to capture the scale of the advertisements and buildings before transitioning to the street where the road and traffic become visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with vehicle traffic and dense neon signage

walking along sidewalk parallel to the street traffic

segments.scene_description: Walking along a multi-lane city street at night with sparse vehicle traffic passing by. The wet asphalt reflects the bright street lights and neon signs from the surrounding buildings, while the camera moves parallel to the road separated by a metal railing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered pedestrian corridor into the expansive, rain-drenched heart of a neon-lit cyberpunk metropolis. It begins within a semi-enclosed walkway, passing yellow structural beams and glowing vending machines before moving toward the light of an open plaza. As the camera emerges from the cover, the environment opens into a wide square exposed to heavy rain, where wet pavement reflects the shifting purple and cyan hues of geometric canopy structures and a large holographic billboard. The perspective then tilts upward to capture the overwhelming scale of towering glass skyscrapers and massive vertical advertisements before descending toward the city street. Finally, the movement settles into a steady walk along a multi-lane road, gliding parallel to a metal railing as sparse traffic passes over asphalt shimmering with the reflections of the surrounding city lights.
